meaning: a歇斯底里的,异常兴奋的
examples: Police and bodyguards had to form a human shield around him as the almost hysterical crowds struggled to approach him.
It's a poem that begins, "I have heard that hysterical women say they are sick of the palette and fiddle-bow, of poets that are always gay."
The taxi driver was nearly hysterical, convinced I would be eaten by a tiger.
When she was told that a tube was helping Millie breathe she became hysterical.
